arts.ttl: Man City handed major Erling Haaland injury scare
arts.sum: Manchester City striker Erling Haaland was forced off injured in the second half of the FA Cup tie against Bournemouth

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland is branded as 'very lackadaisical' by Roy Keane after missing a penalty during first half of FA Cup tie at Bournemouth - as Ian Wright questions if Man City are 'up for it'
arts.sum: Haaland's spot-kick was saved by Bournemouth goalkeeper Kepa Arrizabalaga in the first half of the FA Cup quarter-final tie.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland forced off with ankle injury in Man City’s must-win FA Cup tie
arts.sum: The striker was replaced by Omar Marmoush, who scored with his first touch

arts.ttl: Roy Keane launches scathing attack on Man City's players during Bournemouth FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Roy Keane in on punditry duty for Manchester City's FA Cup quarter-final tie against Bournemouth

arts.ttl: LIVE: Man City trail Bournemouth in FA Cup quarterfinal.
Manchester City in 'race' to sign Eintracht Frankfurt star as Pep Guardiola looks to rebuild, challenge for Premier League title
arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly hold interest in another Eintracht Frankfurt star, with Pep Guardiola keen on rebuilding his side to challenge for the title next season.

arts.ttl: FA Cup semi-final draw: Man City handed tricky Wembley test if they beat Bournemouth as Premier League sides learn opponents
arts.sum: The draw for the semi-finals was conducted after Aston Villa beat Preston North End. Both ties will be played at Wembley over the weekend of April 26 and 27.

arts.ttl: Forest await Cherries in semifinal if Bournemouth beat Man City
arts.sum: Should the Cherries beat Manchester City in the FA Cup, they will face Nottingham Forest at Wembley in the semifinal.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth vs Manchester City - FA Cup: Live score, team news and updates as Erling Haaland has early penalty SAVED in battle to reach Wembley semi
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Bournemouth host Manchester City in the quarter-finals of the FA Cup at Vitality Stadium.

arts.ttl: FA Cup semi-finals: Bournemouth or City to play Forest as Palace face Villa
arts.sum: The winners of the FA Cup quarter-final between Bournemouth and Manchester City will face Nottingham Forest in the last four, while Crystal Palace will play Aston Villa in the semi-finals.
